lead_flow: Lead submits Meta lead form OR Google lead form OR website form OR calls in
Qualification engine scores urgency, service fit, geography, and value
Instant response is sent within minutes or seconds
Lead is offered booking link or live callback
Calendly or Google Calendar event is created
Deposit/payment link is offered when relevant
Contact/company/deal records are created or updated in CRM
Follow-up sequence adapts based on no-response / booked / canceled / qualified / disqualified
Outcome is fed back into source and script scoring
